school_address.streetAddress: 9/105 C, Mettupalayam Rd, Sri Murugan Nagar, Vellakinar, Thudiyalur, Tamil Nadu 641029

reviews.author: Vasavi Arun
reviews.review_body: As a parent if your focus is not just on subjects/marks and you want your child to explore beyond that, choose this School!! There is continuous improvement in all aspects which i could certainly vouch for!! More than that, the school listens to us and takes in charge of that, which i don't think anywhere would happen!! Kudos to the Leader and all the executors.. Absolute team work!! I missed such a school in my childhood days.. My children are blessed to be here..

reviews.author: sneha s
reviews.review_body:
Awesome 👌 staff infrastructure,
Education system and planning astounding

reviews.author: alex martin
reviews.review_body:
Hill Side Prep is a second home for My son & Daughter. We are blessed to have it near to where we live.
My Son & daughter is truly happy when at Hillside Prep.
The efforts of teachers are so good and appreciated... I can see many improvements in my child. Teachers are also friendly and easy approachable.

In Brief: Kids enjoy their School days

reviews.author: Laks Sahayaprasath
reviews.review_body: Excellent school! Highly qualified and caring educators. The priority is always the kids. The educators try to work with individual kids to bring optimal results. The kids get utmost individual attention and the global curriculum helps. Probably one of the very few schools in Coimbatore/tamilnadu where the educators actually listen and also give constructive feedback about the kids.

reviews.author: Harshini Muralidharan
reviews.review_body: It is wonderful school. The curriculum is very research oriented and is very useful for universities. It is very progressive and children encouraging school

reviews.author: Shibi Samrath
reviews.review_body: Hillside Prep is a school with a difference. Their comprehensive curriculum is carefully designed to promote holistic child development.The school's environment(premises to academic staffs to support staffs) is highly conducive to a child's growth, and their commitment to nurturing each child's potential is truly remarkable. The passionate teachers at Hillside Prep pay close attention to every child, which is evident from kids learning trajectory. The students have a genuine fondness for the school, and they offers a wide array of extracurricular activities to further enhance the children's experiences. They offer a thoughtfully crafted menu for both snacks and lunch, ensuring a balance of nutrition while delighting the taste buds of the kids. Additionally, the school's management team is incredibly friendly and approachable making it distinctive indeed...

reviews.author: N K
reviews.review_body: Facilities and care is top in class. Very polite and knowledgeable teachers in board. Cambridge education structure. Doctor in-house. Food or snacks served by Sodexo, a French catering company. Any celebration or annual days are professionally conducted and communicated well. Yes, its more than a reasonable fee, but worth the facility provided! Overall, they stand on top in all.

reviews.author: Pramod Nair
reviews.review_body:
We opted for this school post a lot of research.
As a parent I feel very satisfied upon visiting the campus
The Ambience is great! My 5 year old is eager and ready to start
Good detailed planning of things, really appreciate
The teaching & the support staff have been of good assistance during multiple visits

reviews.author: asok deve
reviews.review_body: Very good infrastructure and the quality of teaching method is good

reviews.author: Kingston Roy
reviews.review_body: Wonderful atmosphere. Clean and well maintained class rooms. They make our children to explore everything practically by taking them to field trips,  Lot of exposure. Friendly teachers. One of best international school in the Coimbatore. My kids happy going to school.
